'''''Corellia Star''''' was a [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 light freighter]].

==History==
[[File:Corpilot.png|thumb|left|The [[Unidentified captain (Corellia Star)|pilot]] of ''Corellia Star'']]
His [[Unidentified captain (Corellia Star)|pilot]] was aware of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire's]] secret weapons project, the [[TIE/ph "Phantom" Multi-Role Stealth Starfighter/Legends|TIE Phantom]]. Being sympathetic to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]], he decided to offer his inside information. When he approached [[Dreighton]], he tried to warn two Rebel [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wings]] that flew in that system, while Imperial troops boarded the ''Corellia'', which was then captured and held in the Imperial base on the planet. The pilot was seen getting shot during his distress call, and it is presumed that both he and his crew perished.

The distress call was not clearly received, so the two Rebel ships approached the planet to find out what happened. The leader, [[Kirby]], was blown out of the air, but the other, [[Rookie One]], managed to eject.
Having no other means to escape the planet, Rookie entered the base and fighting his way through, reached the ''Corellia Star''. He escaped the base by flying through mining tunnels and delivered it to the Alliance fleet.

The pilot's message was then played by [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Ackbar]] and it was discovered that it spoke about the secret Imperial activity in the [[Arah asteroid belt|Belt of Arah]] as well as [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader's]] new weapon.

==Behind the scenes==
The ''Corellia Star'' bears an unmistakable resemblance to the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']]. The digital model for the ship consisted of 40,000 polygons.<ref name="The Secrets of Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire">''[[The Secrets of Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire]]'', Part 4: Battle Zones, II. Battleships</ref>

If the ''Corellia Star'' crashes, a game over cutscene shows 2 stormtroopers in a post the first stormtrooper was wondering what is that noise and the second tells him probably some loose rock or something.
